relevant_files.role: Current single-scenario React implementation and validation helpers.
Current two-column scenario map and detail panel styling.
Current Vitest interaction coverage for Phase 1 scenario map.
Current Playwright smoke path for rendered UI.

module_boundaries: Current app is concentrated in src/main.tsx; Phase 2 should extract rule/data/state helpers before replacing UI.
src/styles.css owns layout; grid-template-columns still encodes a permanent right sidebar.
Tests are app-level and should be extended around recommendation behavior, route persistence, and canvas interaction.

call_chains.name: Current rendered evidence display
flow: title attribute points to maestro-flow paths

data_flows: Authored ScenarioModel data flows directly into App rendering; no separate recommendation engine exists yet.
State is single active path only; no branch collection or saved route state exists yet.
No localStorage reads/writes were found in src/.

code_anchors.summary: ScenarioModel is the current authored data boundary; it is not a CommandRuleSet or branch-aware graph model.
Unclear Requirements fixture hard-codes one linear scenario path and authored node coordinates.
Validation helpers already check references and citation coverage; these can evolve into rule/sourceRef validation.
App state tracks one active step and one selected node; Phase 2 needs branch-aware route state.
Permanent detail panel hosts command, choices, alternatives, and source status; Phase 2 should replace this with canvas-first contextual surfaces.
Workspace layout uses a fixed 390px side panel column, conflicting with canvas-first direction.
Current tests cover Phase 1 scenario choices and keyboard activation, but not rules, branches, localStorage, or evidence persistence.
Validation commands available: npm test, npm run test:e2e, npm run build.

gaps: No CommandRuleSet schema or rule validation module exists.
No recommendation engine exists; command choice is authored per ScenarioStep.
No branch-aware canvas route state exists.
UI still depends on a permanent right detail panel.
risks: Doing UI first may bake in the wrong state shape; define rule and canvas state contracts first.
Replacing the whole single file at once risks test regression; plan should sequence data/rules, state, UI, persistence, tests.
SourceRef claims can drift unless validated against maestro-flow paths.
